name: C-3 --standards-cited populates the standards_state block keyed by source id
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc123 --out m.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --standards-cited google-tsguide && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("m.json","utf8"));const s=j.standards_state;process.exit(s&&s["google-tsguide"]?0:1)' && echo cited 1>&2
